instruction: Establish a chronic disease monitoring plan for your conditions (['Type 2 Diabetes', 'Hypertension', 'Chronic Kidney Disease']) using only appointments: 1) Schedule exactly one monitoring appointment with reason "HbA1c monitoring", 2) Schedule exactly one monitoring appointment with reason "Kidney function monitoring", 3) Schedule exactly one PCP appointment with reason "Monthly blood pressure review", 4) Schedule exactly one cardiology appointment with reason "Annual cardiology monitoring", 5) Schedule exactly one endocrinology appointment with reason "Annual endocrinology monitoring". Do not send any messages and do not modify any prescriptions.
